externalReferences.comment: MongoDB Community Edition is self-managed and can be hosted locally or in the cloud.
MongoDB Enterprise Advanced has powerful tools for automation, operations, and security in self-managed environments.

components.author: Mozilla Corporation
components.name: Mozilla Firefox ESR
components.description: The C++-only SpiderMonkey component of FireFox ESR used by MongoDB.
components.copyright: Mozilla Corporation

components.author: Daniel Veillard
components.name: libxml2
components.description: libxml2 is an XML toolkit implemented in C, originally developed for the GNOME project. It provides a set of interfaces for parsing, modifying, and validating XML documents.
components.copyright: Copyright (C) 1998-2012 Daniel Veillard. All Rights Reserved. Copyright (C) The Libxml2 Contributors.

components.author: Marius Cornea
components.name: Intel® Decimal Floating-Point Math Library

components.description: Unicode Data Files

components.description: This header file is part of Valgrind, a dynamic binary instrumentation framework.

components.author: Austin Appleby
components.name: MurmurHash3
components.description: MurmurHash is a non-cryptographic hash function suitable for general hash-based lookup.
components.copyright: MurmurHash3 was written by Austin Appleby, and is placed in the public domain. The author hereby disclaims copyright to this source code.

components.author: The Abseil Authors
components.name: Abseil Common Libraries (C++)

components.name: Apache Arrow Nanoarrow
components.description: Helpers for Arrow C Data & Arrow C Stream interfaces
components.copyright: Copyright 2016-present The Apache Software Foundation

components.name: Apache Arrow
components.description: Apache Arrow is a cross-language development platform for in-memory data. It specifies a standardized language-independent columnar memory format for flat and hierarchical data, organized for efficient analytic operations on modern hardware.
components.copyright: Copyright 2016-2026 The Apache Software Foundation

components.name: Apache Avro
components.description: Apache Avro is a data serialization system. This is the C++ implementation.

components.name: Apache Iceberg™ C++
components.description: C++ implementation of Apache Iceberg™, the open table format for analytic datasets.

components.name: Apache Thrift
components.description: Thrift is a lightweight, language-independent software stack for point-to-point RPC implementation.

components.author: Juanpe Bolívar
components.name: immer
components.description: Postmodern immutable and persistent data structures for C++ — value semantics at scale

components.name: AWS SDK for C++
components.description: The AWS SDK for C++ provides a C++ interface for Amazon Web Services.

components.author: Microsoft Corporation
components.name: Azure SDK for C++ - Storage Blobs
components.description: Azure Storage Blobs client library for C++. This library provides functionality for uploading, downloading, and managing blobs in Azure Storage.
components.copyright: Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.

components.author: Boost Developers
components.name: Boost C++ Libraries
components.description: Super-project for modularized Boost. Boost is a repository of free, portable, peer-reviewed C++ libraries. It acts as a proving ground for new libraries, particularly those which work well with the ISO C++ Standard Library.
components.copyright: Boost copyright claims are made on a per-file basis and listed as comments in source file headers

components.author: Daniel Stenberg

components.author: Christopher M. Kohlhoff

components.description: Asio is a cross-platform C++ library for network and low-level I/O programming that provides developers with a consistent asynchronous model using a modern C++ approach.

components.author: The Cyrus Team
components.name: Cyrus SASL
components.description: Simple Authentication and Security Layer (SASL) is a specification that describes how authentication mechanisms can be plugged into an application protocol on the wire. Cyrus SASL is an implementation of SASL that makes it easy for application developers to integrate authentication mechanisms into their application in a generic way.
components.copyright: Copyright (c) 1998-2003 Carnegie Mellon University. All rights reserved.

components.author: Google LLC

components.description: TCMalloc is Google's customized implementation of C's malloc() and C++'s operator new used for memory allocation within our C and C++ code. TCMalloc is a fast, multi-threaded malloc implementation.
components.copyright: Copyright 2024 The TCMalloc Authors

components.author: gpertools Project
components.name: gperftools
components.description: gperftools (originally Google Performance Tools) is a collection of a high-performance multi-threaded malloc() implementation, plus some pretty nifty performance analysis tools.

components.author: gRPC authors
components.name: gRPC (C++)
components.description: gRPC is a modern, open source, high-performance remote procedure call (RPC) framework that can run anywhere. gRPC enables client and server applications to communicate transparently, and simplifies the building of connected systems.

components.author: Jupp Mueller, Gregor Jasny

components.author: LibTom Projects
components.name: LibTomCrypt
components.description: LibTomCrypt is a fairly comprehensive, modular and portable cryptographic toolkit that provides developers with a vast array of well known published block ciphers, one-way hash functions, chaining modes, pseudo-random number generators, public key cryptography and a plethora of other routines.
components.copyright: Team libtom.

components.author: The libunwind project
components.name: libunwind
components.description: The primary goal of this project is to define a portable and efficient C programming interface (API) to determine the call-chain of a program. The API additionally provides the means to manipulate the preserved (callee-saved) state of each call-frame and to resume execution at any point in the call-chain (non-local goto). The API supports both local (same-process) and remote (across-process) operation.
components.copyright: Copyright (C) 2008 CodeSourcery, 2021 Loongson Technology Corporation Limited

components.author: Jean-loup Gailly, Mark Adler
components.name: zlib
components.description: zlib is a general purpose data compression library.

components.description: Required C library for Client Side and Queryable Encryption in MongoDB

components.author: The OpenTelemetry Authors
components.name: opentelemetry-cpp
components.description: OpenTelemetry, also known as OTel, is a vendor-neutral open source Observability framework for instrumenting, generating, collecting, and exporting telemetry data such as traces, metrics, and logs. As an industry-standard, OpenTelemetry is supported by more than 40 observability vendors, integrated by many libraries, services, and apps, and adopted by numerous end users.
components.copyright: Copyright The OpenTelemetry Authors

components.author: The CRoaring authors
components.name: CRoaring
components.description: Roaring bitmaps in C (and C++), with SIMD (AVX2, AVX-512 and NEON) optimizations: used by Apache Doris, ClickHouse, and StarRocks. Roaring bitmaps are compressed bitmaps which tend to outperform conventional compressed bitmaps such as WAH, EWAH or Concise. In some instances, they can be hundreds of times faster and they often offer significantly better compression.
components.copyright: Copyright 2016-2022 The CRoaring authors
